allow: PowerShell($d = Get-Content "D:\\octagonNEW\\Octagon\\backend\\data\\model-weights.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Keys:" \($d.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ", "\); Write-Host "trainingStats:" \($d.trainingStats | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\); Write-Host "ensembleWeights:" \($d.ensembleWeights | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\); Write-Host "featureImportance count:" $d.featureImportance.Count; Write-Host "First 3 features:" \($d.featureImportance[0..2] | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\))
